overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing high-speed driving through Night City. The player navigates a futuristic convertible through elevated highways and dense urban streets at dusk, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway transitioning from covered bridge to open air

events.description: exits covered highway bridge into open elevated highway section
emerges from shadow into dusk ambient light with visible sky

agents.ego_description: accelerating along elevated highway, emerging from covered section into open air while weaving through traffic

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure covering the initial section of highway
yellow and black striped safety barriers along the highway edge
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows in the distance
large holographic advertisement displaying 'NICO LA' in bright colors
illuminated sign for '24/7 STORE' on the right side of the highway
large metal sign structure spanning across the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated highway covered by a concrete bridge structure. Around 5 seconds, the vehicle emerges from the covered section into open air, transitioning from shadow to the mixed lighting of dusk. The futuristic skyline of Night City becomes visible in the distance, lined with neon billboards and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown highway with holographic advertisements

events.description: passes under large overhead gantry structure spanning the highway

agents.ego_description: weaving through moderate traffic at high speed on the downtown highway, approaching the exit

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical skyscraper with large '08' illuminated on the facade
large red neon sign displaying 'HYDRO SUBSID' on the right side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds along the open downtown highway surrounded by massive cyberpunk skyscrapers. The distinctive cylindrical tower marked '08' dominates the center of the view ahead. Around 15 seconds, the car passes under a large overhead gantry while navigating through traffic, with various holographic billboards lining the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with red concrete barriers

events.description: takes exit ramp, beginning curved descent from elevated highway
navigates around slower moving truck on the curved ramp

agents.ego_description: taking the exit ramp, navigating a sharp right curve while braking and changing lanes

notable_agents.action: yellow truck moving slowly in the right lane of the ramp

entered.detail: tall red concrete barriers lining the curved exit ramp
large commercial building with 'DATA INC' neon signage visible on the facade
descending curved roadway with white lane markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes an exit ramp around 22 seconds, transitioning from the straight highway to a curved descent. The camera follows the car as it navigates the bend lined with red concrete barriers, passing a slow-moving yellow truck on the right. The 'DATA INC' building becomes more prominent on the left as the car descends toward street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection with commercial buildings and transit infrastructure

events.description: turns right at intersection with pedestrian crosswalk markings
passes under urban overpass into commercial district with palm trees

agents.ego_description: navigating city intersections, making a right turn and continuing through commercial streets with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete elevated transit structure crossing over the street
tall palm trees lining the center median of the street
large pink neon sign reading 'HOTEL' on a building facade
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt
multi-story commercial building with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: Descending to street level, the vehicle navigates through downtown intersections, making a right turn around 35 seconds at a marked crosswalk. The scene transitions as the car passes under an urban overpass around 40 seconds, entering a commercial district with palm trees lining the street and a prominent pink neon hotel sign visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street canyon with dense neon signage

events.description: enters dense neon district with heavy artificial lighting and enclosed urban canyon

agents.ego_description: cruising through the narrow neon-lit street, surrounded by holographic advertisements and commercial storefronts

entered.detail: concentrated cluster of bright pink and blue neon signs covering building facades
large floating holographic advertisements projecting from building walls
tight urban corridor enclosed by tall buildings on both sides
ground floor commercial storefronts with illuminated entrances

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow urban canyon around 50 seconds, where natural dusk light is replaced by intense neon and holographic lighting from surrounding commercial buildings. The street becomes enclosed by towering structures covered in bright advertisements, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere as the drive continues through the vibrant commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from a shadowed elevated highway into the neon-drenched depths of a dense commercial district. It begins beneath a concrete bridge structure, emerging from the shadows into the mixed light of dusk as the futuristic skyline of Night City and its holographic advertisements reveal themselves. The camera then speeds along the open downtown highway toward a dominant cylindrical tower before gliding under an overhead gantry and banking onto a curved exit ramp lined with red concrete barriers. As the vehicle descends from the highway, it navigates through street-level intersections and passes under an urban overpass, shifting the scenery toward a district characterized by palm trees and pink neon signage. Finally, the drive enters a narrow urban canyon where the fading natural light is completely replaced by the intense, immersive glow of towering holographic billboards and vibrant commercial architecture.
